response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The vocal performance of '劣等上等' (Rettou Joutou) phonetically matches the provided Reference JSON lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the Reference JSON for the song segment (03:09-04:59); the preceding conversational and news segments (00:00-03:09) were 100% manually transcribed and translated due to lack of reference text. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied aggressive end-time truncation and instantaneous transitions to manage the rapid-fire banter in the digital carriage and the fast-paced delivery of the news segment and song verses, ensuring subtitles stay anchored to the vocal bursts.
